scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --kill-others-on-fail --kill-timeout 3000 -n "api-patient,api-doctor,api-assistant,patient-portal,doctor-portal,assistant-portal" -c "blue,cyan,green,magenta,yellow,red" "pnpm --filter api-patient dev" "pnpm --filter api-doctor dev" "pnpm --filter api-assistant dev" "pnpm --filter patient-portal dev" "pnpm --filter doctor-portal dev" "pnpm --filter assistant-portal dev"
scripts.docker:reset: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --profile apps down -v && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml --profile apps up -d --build
scripts.mobile:release:clean: cd apps/patient-mobile/android && node -e "const fs=require('fs');['app/.cxx','app/build','build'].forEach(d=>{try{fs.rmSync(d,{recursive:true,force:true})}catch{}})" && gradlew.bat app:clean assembleRelease
scripts.mobile:test: pnpm mobile:setup && npm --prefix apps/patient-mobile install && pnpm mobile:release:install
scripts.update-all-packages: pnpm npm-check-updates -u -w --packageManager pnpm --reject class-validator,tailwindcss && pnpm install
